# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector-webhook-config
webhooks:
- clientConfig:
    service:
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
      path: "/inject"
  admissionReviewVersions:
  - v1beta1
  - v1
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector.linkerd.io
  rules:
  - operations: ["CREATE"]
    apiGroups: [""]
    apiVersions: ["v1"]
    resources: ["pods"]
  sideEffects: NoneOrUnknown

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-service-account
  identity:
    dnsSuffix: cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - network: "10.0.0.0/8"
    to:
    - port: 80
      operation: Allow

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-service-account
  rules:
  - from:
    - network: "10.0.0.0/8"
    to:
    - port: 80
      operation: Allow
